-- NOSONAR
-- ============================================================================
-- Ice Truck Tracking — TimescaleDB Schema (Production-Grade)
-- PostgreSQL 16 + TimescaleDB 2.x
-- =========
\n\nCREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;
\n\nCREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_trgm;

DO $$ BEGIN
  CREATE TYPE alert_type AS ENUM (
    'temperature_high', 'temperature_low', 'speed_exceeded', 'geofence_breach',
    'route_deviation', 'idle_too_long', 'maintenance_due', 'connection_

-- Refresh tokens (JWT rotation)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS refresh_tokens (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid (),
    user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_refresh_tokens_user ON refresh_tokens (user_id);
\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_refresh_tokens_family ON refresh_tokens (family);

-- Trucks
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trucks (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid (),
    license_plate VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    model VARCHAR(50),
    capacity_kg DECIMAL(10, 2)

-- Drivers
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS drivers (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid (),
    user_id UUID REFERENCES users (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    license_no VARCHAR(30) UNIQUE NOT N

-- Shops (delivery destinations)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shops (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid (),
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    address TEXT,
    latitude DOUBLE PRECISIO

-- Routes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS routes (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid (),
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    truck_id UUID REFERENCES trucks (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    dri

-- Route stops (ordered shop visits)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS route_stops (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid (),
    route_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES routes (id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

-- Alerts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alerts (
    time TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    truck_id UUID REFERENCES trucks (id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    driver_id UUID REFERENCES drivers (id) ON

-- Audit log (immutable)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log (
    time TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
    user_id UUID,
    action VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    resource VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_telemetry_payload ON telemetry USING GIN (payload);

-- Alert indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alerts_truck_time ON alerts (truck_id, time DESC);
\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alerts_severity ON alerts (severity, time DESC);
\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alerts_metadata ON alerts USING GIN (metadata);

-- Audit log indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_user ON audit_log (user_id, time DESC);

-- User indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON users (email);
\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_role ON users (role);

-- Truck indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trucks_status ON trucks (status);
\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_trucks_plate ON trucks (license_plate);

-- Driver indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_drivers_truck ON drivers (assigned_truck);

-- Daily alert summary
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS alerts_daily
WITH (timescaledb.continuous) AS
SELECT
    time_bucket ('1 day', time) AS bucket,
    truck_id,
    severity,
    COUNT(*)

SELECT
    add_continuous_aggregate_policy (
        'alerts_daily',
        start_offset = > INTERVAL '3 days',
        end_offset = > INTERVAL '1 day',
        schedule_interval = > INTERVAL '1 da
